title: Evangelion x 7 11 x Mitsuoka Orochi
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion x 7-11 x Mitsuoka Orochi             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Nov 10, 2014 10:25 pm http://www.mitsuoka-motor.com/campaign/orochi_eva/ tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) If the site doesn't load as it seems to be under heavy load  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Nov 10, 2014 10:38 pm Like I mentioned in the channel, never thought the Orochi looked that good, but with this livery it's off the charts. Top Gear did a short feature about this car along with the other one that was supposed to copy a Bentley or Rolls. http://www.autoblog.com/2006/10/03/mitsuoka-orochi-specs-pricing-announced/

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Nov 10, 2014 10:55 pm Maybe all the other car manufacturers wouldn't allow such a paintjob? tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Nov 13, 2014 2:15 pm TBH I see a Skittles mix in that paint scheme more than Eva. At that price point a much better design could have been conceived. Or take the money and put it into making a great looking itasha.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Nov 13, 2014 2:27 pm So I made this thing:

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Nov 13, 2014 2:53 pm I couldn't had said it better Monkey.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 13, 2014 4:16 pm My thoughts exactly! Been wanting to reply for the past few days but nothing really came to mind other than "Yikes!".

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Nov 13, 2014 4:59 pm That doesn't even remotely looks like an Eva or with Eva themed symbols!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Nov 13, 2014 5:09 pm So all this promotion (going back to the campaign from a few months ago including that 2 m tall Eva-01) means that 7-Eleven replaces Lawson in 4.0 if the world gets fixed and doesn't end up still being shit? Or Eva is working the konbini chains 1 at a time. Looking at you Family Mart and Circle K Sunkus.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Nov 13, 2014 5:21 pm ...yeah, that's pretty gross. I wouldn't buy it-- but I'm sure there's a rabid fan out there somewhere who will...

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Nov 13, 2014 7:13 pm Going back a few years, Yamashita did do a custom scheme for Tamiya's RC race cars that's similar. The main difference being the Orochi's has smoother lines to fit better with the car. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Nov 14, 2014 4:09 am ^ Except that in this case it looks like an Eva-themed product: you have the right colors, the lines, the hexagons, the NERV logo, EVA-01's logo... But in the orochi car case there's nothing like that, it looks more like the painter got an epileptic crisis while tripping balls on LSD!

[]:             Quote Post by TomasJC » Sun Nov 16, 2014 12:12 am Imagine watching that thing drive past at top speed...
